name: Bean Dip a La Dr. Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last 2 in a saucepan.
2. Heat to boiling.
3. Pour into blender or electric mixer.
4. Add cheese.
5. Blend on high speed until well mixed.
6. Pour into warmer dish.
7. Cover with bacon.
8. Serve with chips, crackers.
